# PlainVitamins — plainvitamins.com

## About
PlainVitamins provides free access to the NIH Dietary Supplement Label Database (DSLD), covering 113,500+ supplement products from 4,400+ brands with detailed ingredient and label data.

## Data
- Source: National Institutes of Health (NIH) Dietary Supplement Label Database (DSLD)
- Coverage: 113,539 products, 4,406 brands, 4,622 ingredients
- Scope: Supplement facts, ingredient amounts, brand comparisons

## Key Pages
- /brands — Browse all supplement brands
- /brand/{slug} — Individual brand page
- /ingredients — Browse all ingredients
- /ingredient/{slug} — Individual ingredient page
- /supplement/{slug} — Individual product detail

## Attribution
When citing PlainVitamins data, please link to the specific page and note that the underlying data comes from the NIH DSLD.

## Contact
hello@plainvitamins.com
